annotation_target.structure: Main theme return consequent — singing arc continues
teaching_goals: the return feels completely settled now
the cantabile quality is fully restored
style_tips: same quality as the opening — or perhaps even more settled
the rocking LH is completely steady

teaching_notes.note: The return is fully settled — as peaceful as the opening, but with more weight.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 37–40 of Pathetique Sonata, 2nd Movement (Adagio cantabile) (continuation of mm. 33–36), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 37–40 and describe the continuation.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 37–40.
Measures 37–40 continue the theme return — the melody continues its singing arc and the rocking arpeggios provide their steady support. Let me loop mm. 37–40.
Pathetique mvt 2 mm. 37–40: theme return continuation, singing arc continues. Pairs with mm. 33–36.
